attributes.name: nr
attributes.label: Nr
attributes.description: Row identifier (primary key)

attributes.name: type_tinyint
attributes.label: type_tinyint
attributes.description: 1-byte signed integer (-128 to 127); trino has no TINYINT, mapped to NUMBER(3)

attributes.name: type_smallint
attributes.label: type_smallint
attributes.description: 2-byte signed integer (-32,768 to 32,767)

attributes.name: type_integer
attributes.label: type_integer
attributes.description: 4-byte signed integer (-2^31 to 2^31-1)

attributes.name: type_bigint
attributes.label: type_bigint
attributes.description: 8-byte signed integer (-2^63 to 2^63-1); trino has no BIGINT, mapped to NUMBER(19)

attributes.name: type_hugeint
attributes.label: type_hugeint
attributes.description: 16-byte signed integer (-2^127 to 2^127-1); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMBER(38) in trino

attributes.name: type_utinyint
attributes.label: type_utinyint
attributes.description: 1-byte unsigned integer (0 to 255); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMBER(3) in trino

attributes.name: type_usmallint
attributes.label: type_usmallint
attributes.description: 2-byte unsigned integer (0 to 65,535); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMBER(5) in trino

attributes.name: type_uinteger
attributes.label: type_uinteger
attributes.description: 4-byte unsigned integer (0 to 2^32-1); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMBER(10) in trino

attributes.name: type_ubigint
attributes.label: type_ubigint
attributes.description: 8-byte unsigned integer (0 to 2^64-1); DuckDB-specific, mapped to NUMBER(20) in trino

attributes.name: type_decimal
attributes.label: type_decimal
attributes.description: Fixed-point exact numeric with 18 significant digits and 4 decimal places

attributes.name: type_numeric
attributes.label: type_numeric
attributes.description: Alias for DECIMAL; identical fixed-point semantics to DECIMAL(18,4)

attributes.name: type_real
attributes.label: type_real
attributes.description: 4-byte IEEE 754 single-precision float (~7 significant digits); inexact

attributes.name: type_float
attributes.label: type_float
attributes.description: trino FLOAT is a subtype of NUMBER with precision in binary digits

attributes.name: type_double
attributes.label: type_double
attributes.description: 8-byte IEEE 754 double-precision float (~15 significant digits); trino uses BINARY_DOUBLE

attributes.name: type_number
attributes.label: type_number
attributes.description: trino native arbitrary-precision numeric type with 18 significant digits and 4 decimal places

attributes.name: type_binary_float
attributes.label: type_binary_float
attributes.description: trino native 32-bit IEEE 754 single-precision float

attributes.name: type_boolean
attributes.label: type_boolean
attributes.description: Logical true/false value; trino SQL has no native BOOLEAN, mapped to NUMBER(1)

attributes.name: type_char
attributes.label: type_char
attributes.description: Fixed-length character string, padded with spaces to declared length

attributes.name: type_varchar
attributes.label: type_varchar
attributes.description: Variable-length string; trino recommends VARCHAR2 over VARCHAR

attributes.name: type_text
attributes.label: type_text
attributes.description: Large text data; trino has no TEXT type, mapped to CLOB

attributes.name: type_string
attributes.label: type_string
attributes.description: Variable-length string alias; DuckDB-specific, mapped to VARCHAR2(4000) in trino

attributes.name: type_varchar2
attributes.label: type_varchar2
attributes.description: trino native variable-length character string; preferred over VARCHAR

attributes.name: type_nchar
attributes.label: type_nchar
attributes.description: trino native fixed-length national character string using the national character set

attributes.name: type_nvarchar2
attributes.label: type_nvarchar2
attributes.description: trino native variable-length national character string

attributes.name: type_clob
attributes.label: type_clob
attributes.description: trino native character large object for large text data up to 4GB

attributes.name: type_blob
attributes.label: type_blob
attributes.description: Variable-length binary large object; stores arbitrary raw bytes

attributes.name: type_bit
attributes.label: type_bit
attributes.description: Bit string; trino has no BIT type, mapped to RAW(1)

attributes.name: type_raw
attributes.label: type_raw
attributes.description: trino native fixed-length raw binary data

attributes.name: type_date
attributes.label: type_date
attributes.description: Calendar date (year, month, day); in trino DATE always includes a time component

attributes.name: type_time
attributes.label: type_time
attributes.description: Time of day; trino has no dedicated TIME type, mapped to DATE which always includes time

attributes.name: type_timestamp
attributes.label: type_timestamp
attributes.description: Date and time with fractional seconds; no timezone

attributes.name: type_timestamp_s
attributes.label: type_timestamp_s
attributes.description: Timestamp with second precision; trino TIMESTAMP(0)

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ms
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ms
attributes.description: Timestamp with millisecond precision; trino TIMESTAMP(3)

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ns
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ns
attributes.description: Timestamp with nanosecond precision; trino TIMESTAMP(9)

attributes.name: type_timestamptz
attributes.label: type_timestamptz
attributes.description: Timestamp with time zone; stores UTC value and preserves the session timezone offset

attributes.name: type_timestamp_ltz
attributes.label: type_timestamp_ltz
attributes.description: trino native timestamp with local time zone; normalizes to database timezone on storage

attributes.name: type_interval_ym
attributes.label: type_interval_ym
attributes.description: Duration in years and months; trino INTERVAL YEAR TO MONTH

attributes.name: type_interval_ds
attributes.label: type_interval_ds
attributes.description: Duration in days, hours, minutes and seconds; trino INTERVAL DAY TO SECOND

attributes.name: type_uuid
attributes.label: type_uuid
attributes.description: 128-bit universally unique identifier; trino has no native UUID type, mapped to RAW(16)

attributes.name: type_json
attributes.label: type_json
attributes.description: JSON data; native type in trino 21c and later

links.name: same_check
links.comment: both tables refer to the same data record
